hero.title: Build a CV that
hero.subtitle: Create a professional resume in minutes with our guided editor and real-time preview. No sign-up required.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Powerful features to help you create, customize, and share your professional CV.

guidedEditor.title: Guided Editor
guidedEditor.description: Step-by-step wizard that walks you through each section, ensuring you don't miss anything important.

livePreview.title: Live Preview
livePreview.description: See your changes instantly as you type. What you see is exactly what you'll get in your final PDF.

multipleTemplates.title: Multiple Templates
multipleTemplates.description: Choose from professionally designed templates that work for any industry or experience level.

pdfExport.title: PDF Export
pdfExport.description: Download your CV as a perfectly formatted PDF, ready to send to employers.

autoSave.title: Auto-Save
autoSave.description: Your work is automatically saved to your browser. Never lose your progress.

noAccount.title: No Account Needed
noAccount.description: Start building immediately. No sign-up, no email verification, no friction.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Create your professional CV in three simple steps.

step1.title: Fill in your details
step1.description: Our guided wizard walks you through each section—personal info, experience, education, and skills.

step2.title: Choose a template
step2.description: Pick from our collection of professional templates designed to make your CV stand out.

step3.title: Download your CV
step3.description: Export your finished CV as a polished PDF, ready to send to employers.

templateShowcase.title: Professional Templates
templateShowcase.subtitle: Choose from beautifully designed templates that make your experience shine.

free.title: 100% Free
free.description: No hidden costs, no premium tiers. Every feature is available to everyone.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Your data stays in your browser. We don't store or sell your information.

fast.title: Fast & Simple
fast.description: Create a professional CV in under 10 minutes with our intuitive interface.

cta.title: Ready to build your CV?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of job seekers who've created their perfect resume.

footer.tagline: Create your professional CV in minutes.
